name: Guardian Baou
name_jp: ガーディアン・バオウ
desc: Cannot be Summoned unless you control a face-up "Wicked-Breaking Flamberge - Baou". When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: It gains 1000 ATK. Negate the effects of monsters destroyed by battle with this card.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Summoned unless you control a face-up "Wicked-Breaking Flamberge - Baou". When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: It gains 1000 ATK. Negate the effects of monsters destroyed by battle with this card.
eff: Cannot be Summoned unless you control a face-up "Wicked-Breaking Flamberge - Baou". When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: It gains 1000 ATK. Negate the effects of monsters destroyed by battle with this card.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 3: Yugi's World Mega Pack

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
